self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7fc070779880> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fc0707c5e20>
def test_evite_sus_one_day_create(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] sign_up_sheet_maker = config.pages["sign_up_sheet_maker"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sus_event(sus_event="one_day")
sign_up_sheet_maker.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.create_sheet_one_day(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.verify_sheet_sign_ups(test_data=self._json_test_data)
sign_up_sheet_maker.publish_sheet() shareable_link = sign_up_sheet_maker.copy_shareable_link()
login_modal.sign_out()
# Get Volunteer view to build SUS data config.driver.get(shareable_link) logger.info(f"Going volunteer url - {config.driver.current_url}")
sign_up_sheet = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_sign_up_sheet_one_day()
volunteers = sign_up_sheet_maker.initialize_volunteers(volunteers=self._json_test_data["volunteers"])
for volunteer in volunteers:
if volunteer["registered"]: logger.info(f"Registering guest: {volunteer['name']}")
# Change register data self._json_test_data["register"]["first_name"] = volunteer["name"] self._json_test_data["register"]["email"] = volunteer["email_addr"]
# Register login_modal.register(test_data=self._json_test_data['register'], existing_user=True)
sus_row = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_random_sus_row(sus=sign_up_sheet)
> sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sign_up(sus_row)
_test_name = 'test_evite_sus_one_day_create' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fc0707c5e20> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fc0707c57f0> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_sus_one_day_create (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fc0707c5d60> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fc0707c5d30> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fc0707c52b0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7fc070779880> shareable_link = 'https://test2.evite.me/5mEGZw4AD5' sign_up_sheet = [{'row_count': 2, 'row_filled': 1, 'row_title': 'drinks'}, {'row_count': 5, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'chips'}, {'row_count': 10, 'row_filled': 1, 'row_title': 'food'}] sign_up_sheet_maker = <commons.pages.evite.sign_up_sheet_maker.SignUpSheetMaker object at 0x7fc0707c5dc0> sus_row = {'row_count': 10, 'row_filled': 1, 'row_title': 'food'} user_email_addr = 'evite-01302026-114345-60-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' volunteer = {'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260130-1145-722056-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 0, 'kids_count': 0, ...} volunteers = [{'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260130-1145-721725-test@evitetest.com', '...ENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260130-1145-722056-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 0, 'kids_count': 0, ...}]

self = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorHandler object at 0x7fc0707c6ff0> response = {'status': 404, 'value': '{"value":{"error":"stale element reference","message":"stale element reference: stale elemen...9+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x770ACEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x770ACE41+561]\\n"}}'}
def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error.
:Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object.
:Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass
exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException
if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"]
screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"]
stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "<anonymous>") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "<anonymous>") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.StaleElementReferenceException: Message: stale element reference: stale element not found in the current frame E (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#staleelementreferenceexception E Stacktrace: E GetHandleVerifier [0x00FE0283+25139] E (No symbol) [0x00F6B234] E (No symbol) [0x00E404A3] E (No symbol) [0x00E46EA1] E (No symbol) [0x00E48F9A] E (No symbol) [0x00E49017] E (No symbol) [0x00E87BC1] E (No symbol) [0x00E8868B] E (No symbol) [0x00E7DD71] E (No symbol) [0x00EACF84] E (No symbol) [0x00E7D8E4] E (No symbol) [0x00EAD1B4] E (No symbol) [0x00ECE6E1] E (No symbol) [0x00EACD36] E (No symbol) [0x00E7BD29] E (No symbol) [0x00E7D064] E GetHandleVerifier [0x012EB143+3215603] E GetHandleVerifier [0x013022BA+3310186] E GetHandleVerifier [0x012FC4D2+3286146] E GetHandleVerifier [0x01079C80+654384] E (No symbol) [0x00F745BD] E (No symbol) [0x00F714A8] E (No symbol) [0x00F71647] E (No symbol) [0x00F63D20] E BaseThreadInitThunk [0x76DE5D49+25] E RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x770ACEBB+107] E RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x770ACE41+561]
e = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorCode object at 0x7fc06fdeb470> error_code = 'STALE_ELEMENT_REFERENCE' error_codes = ['DETACHED_SHADOW_ROOT', 'ELEMENT_CLICK_INTERCEPTED', 'ELEMENT_IS_NOT_SELECTABLE', 'ELEMENT_NOT_INTERACTABLE', 'ELEMENT_NOT_VISIBLE', 'IME_ENGINE_ACTIVATION_FAILED', ...] error_info = [10, 'stale element reference'] exception_class = <class 'selenium.common.exceptions.StaleElementReferenceException'> message = 'stale element reference: stale element not found in the current frame\n (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126)' response = {'status': 404, 'value': '{"value":{"error":"stale element reference","message":"stale element reference: stale elemen...9+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x770ACEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x770ACE41+561]\\n"}}'} screen = None self = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorHandler object at 0x7fc0707c6ff0> st_value = '\tGetHandleVerifier [0x00FE0283+25139]\n\t(No symbol) [0x00F6B234]\n\t(No symbol) [0x00E404A3]\n\t(No symbol) [0x00E4...0x76DE5D49+25]\n\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x770ACEBB+107]\n\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x770ACE41+561]\n' stacktrace = ['\tGetHandleVerifier [0x00FE0283+25139]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00F6B234]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00E404A3]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00E46EA1]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00E48F9A]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00E49017]', ...] status = 'stale element reference' value = {'error': 'stale element reference', 'message': 'stale element reference: stale element not found in the current frame...x76DE5D49+25]\n\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x770ACEBB+107]\n\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x770ACE41+561]\n'} value_json = '{"value":{"error":"stale element reference","message":"stale element reference: stale element not found in the curren...49+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x770ACEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x770ACE41+561]\\n"}}'

testcase.name: test_evite_copy_premium_past_event

failure.message: Exception: Can't verify page url contains confirm, current url: https://test2.evitelabs.com/invitation/01AEIIAE4SKDAADR4EPQ7YKBO572CI/review?previous=copy_my_events&source_event=01AE7M33FMKHIIHJ4EPPILEWM4VXYI

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_copy_premium_past_event.TestEviteCopyPremiumPastEvent object at 0x7fc7ee90c7a0> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fc7ee975490>
def test_evite_copy_premium_past_event(self, config): """ Copy premium past event: Select past event from DB Copy Change title, time, etc Update and Delete guest list, then update total guest list Send event Verify
:param config: :return: """
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3])
logger.info(f"Start {inspect.stack()[0][3]}")
page = config.pages["page"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] evite_event_page = config.pages["evite_event_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
page.get_url(config.environment, "")
user_email_addr = "" user_pass = "" user_first_name = "" user_last_name = "" event_title = "" cursor = None
# Get event with event_date > 2023-04-01 which is fabric
psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3]) db_connect = psql_db.connect_db()
if self._json_test_data["sign_in"]["email"]: user_email_addr = self._json_test_data["sign_in"]["email"] user_pass = self._json_test_data["sign_in_credentials"]["password"] else: sql_string = ( "SELECT %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s FROM %s WHERE event_create_date > '%s' " "AND event_sent_date > '%s'" "AND env = '%s' " "AND event_cancelled = '%s' " "AND event_premium = '%s' " "AND event_draft = '%s' " "AND event_draft_guests = '%s' " "AND created_by = '%s'" "ORDER BY random() LIMIT %s;" % ( "user_email_addr", "user_pass", "event_title", "event_id", "event_date", "event_premium", settings.DB_TABLE_EVENTS, "2023-04-01", "2023-04-01", settings.ENV, False, True, False, False, "evite", 1, ) )
try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string)
# Check result first, if no data then don't fail: Skip if cursor.rowcount: user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title, event_id, event_date, event_premium = cursor.fetchone() else: msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warn(msg) pytest.skip(msg)
except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success")
# Log in with fetched user
# Log in with fetched user login_modal.sign_in(email=user_email_addr, password=user_pass)
# Get user's first and last name sql_string = psql_db.get_select_from_table_string( settings.DB_TABLE_USERS, ["user_first_name", "user_last_name"], user_email_addr=user_email_addr ) try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string) if cursor.rowcount: user_first_name, user_last_name = cursor.fetchone() else: config.test_failed["value"] = False msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warn(msg) pytest.skip(msg) except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success") finally: db_connect.close() cursor.close()
evite_home_page.select_logged_in_menu(action="events")
# First verify event, we have bad data in db if not my_events.find_event(event_title=event_title, fail=False): # There is a mismatch between event and host, delete the row sql_string = "DELETE FROM %s WHERE user_email_addr = '%s';" % (settings.DB_TABLE_EVENTS, user_email_addr) psql_db.db_execute(sql_string)
config.test_failed["value"] = False pytest.skip(f"Can't find event {event_title}")
my_events.select_event_options(event_title=event_title, event_option="copy_invitation", url="preview") # Update title self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = f"{event_title}-copy" # Get random date between today and range specified in settings self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) # Get random time between 1-12, random :00 or :30, random AM or PM self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() # Update host # NOTE: We might enter different host name here, so can check if JSON data there then don't do update self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = f"{user_first_name} {user_last_name}"
# Step 5: Add Guests step1_template.select_next(url="guests") guest_list = step5_guests.fetch_all_guests_upload_file() guests_to_delete = [guest_list.pop()] step5_guests.delete_guests(guests_to_delete=guests_to_delete)
step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"]) step1_template.select_next(url="review")
> step6_review_send.enter_checkout_page(test_data=self._json_test_data, url="confirm")

'user=jenkins password=xxx dbname=qatests host=34.133.6.167 port=5432', closed: 1> event_date = datetime.datetime(2024, 8, 5, 12, 30) event_id = '01AE7M33FMKHIIHJ4EPPILEWM4VXYI' event_premium = True event_title = 'testCIYTSQ123test_20240715-094315' evite_event_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_page.EviteEventPage object at 0x7fc7ee975010> evite_home_page = 'evite-guest-45029866-l-test@evitetest.com', 'name': 'evite-guest-45029866-L-test'}, {'contact': '(555) 1...est-46165582-P-test'}, {'contact': 'evite-guest-46335382-t-test@evitetest.com', 'name': user_email_addr = 'evite-07152024-094218-94-test@evitetest.com' ORDER BY random();" step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7fc7ee975430> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7fc7ee975580> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7fc7ee9750a0> user_email_addr = self.assert_url_contains(search_string=url) promo_code = None select_next = True self = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7fc7ee9750a0> test_data = {'action': def log_and_raise_exception(self, message): """ Uses logger to log exception and then raises Exception error :param message: Message to log and raise :return: """ self.logger.exception(message) > raise Exception(message) E Exception: Can't verify page url contains confirm, current url: https://test2.evitelabs.com/invitation/01AEIIAE4SKDAADR4EPQ7YKBO572CI/review?previous=copy_my_events&source_event=01AE7M33FMKHIIHJ4EPPILEWM4VXYI
